src: MSLK (Meta Superintelligence Labs Kernels) is a collection of PyTorch GPU operator libraries that are designed and optimized for GenAI training and inference, such as FP8 row-wise quantization and collective communications.
ja: MSLK（Meta Superintelligence Labs Kernels）は、FP8行単位量子化や集合通信など、GenAIの学習・推論向けに設計・最適化されたPyTorch GPU演算子ライブラリ集
